clue: Person takes on bare testy buzz cut?
explanation: BEE STING: buzz cut? BEING (person) takes on EST (bare "tESTy").
hints: Making a word "bare" can mean removing its first and last letters.
This word will "take on" (go around) "bare testy".
Our definition is "buzz cut?", and the question mark indicates that it's a little bit playful.
